name: Gabumon
description: Gabumon is a yellow-skinned wolf-like Digimon about 2 and a half feet tall. He has a horn on his head and a tail. His back is covered in a dog-like blue fur pelt. He evolves from Tsunomon (In-Training form), which evolves from Punimon (Fresh Form). It later evolves in Garurumon (Champion form), WereGarurumon (Ultimate form), MetalGarurumon (MegaForm) and, in Digimon Adventure 02, fuses with WarGraymon in DNA Digivolution into Omnimon. In the series, his partner is Matt Ishida.

name: Irene Belserion

searchTerms: アイリーン・ベルせリオン

name: Johann Faust VIII
description: Faust is a descendant of the original Faustus, a man who made a pact with the devil. In Shaman King, Faust the eighth was a lonely boy who had only one friend, named [Eliza](https://anilist.co/character/18342/Eliza). But Eliza suffered from a deadly disease that no cure, so Faust devoted his life to find one and evetually did it. He became a doctor, saved Eliza's life and married her. description: Kazuhito's favorite novelist, who is actually really sadistic. name: Lucy Mayreel
description: She is lazy and only does things she wants to do. Supposedly she became lazy because she was too strong before even arriving to the academy. The greatest genius at her job and a powerful mage who has reached the pinnacle of the strongest bloodline in the world. She was born with remarkable magical talent that caught the attention of the great magician Glockt from an early age.

name: Meiko
description: __Height:__ 170 cm (5'7") Meiko is the first of the Japanese VOCALOID voice synthesizers released by Crypton. She was created using voice samples from Meiko Haigo. Meiko is portrayed as Kaito's older sister but before it was was going be said that she and Kaito were to be lovers. She is often seen drinking One Cup Ozeki, a popular sake brand in Japan. Thus, sake is her character item. Her signature color is red. It was said that she is often as the "older sister" type.

name: Mikoto Kujou
description: She is a poor, low-class girl but she is smarter and stronger than both boys and girls. Yanagi refers to her as a rival cause he always is second in anything while Kujou is first. She is quite dense in several things like the fact that she does not know Yanagi's feelings for her even though he followed her from primary school to university and even joined the astronomy club to make sure no guys approach her.

name: Misumi Tozawa
description: Tozawa Misumi was a student at the Aeterna Girls' Academy, where she befriended her classmate [Yuuki Asuna](https://anilist.co/character/36828/Asuna-Yuuki). name: Nabiki Tendou
description: The second daughter of Soun Tendo. The most important thing to her is money and she'd do anything to achieve it, including blackmailing her own family members. In some stories, she plays an important role in trying to extort money or placing bets just for her own amusement. She has a sarcastic, materialistic, egoistic, manipulative, sadistic and completely amoral attitude that is a sharp contrast to her older sister. She can in fact, be seen as the most intelligent character in both manga and an

name: Natsu Iwashimizu
description: A shy, awkward, and withdrawn 16-year-old girl. Natsu has difficulty expressing herself and was always put down at home and bullied in school. She becomes essential to the team's survival by observing and writing down what they discover, such as which foods are edible. She has conflicting feelings for Arashi, knowing that he has a girlfriend. She is picked on or rather, teased by Semimaru frequently. Natsu means summer and iwashimizu means water trickling from rocks.

name: Quitterie Raffaeli
nativeName: キトリー・ラファエリ
description: __Height:__ 157 cm (5'2") Hometown: Mousanish District She likes being fashionable and doesn't feel comfortable around strange animals. Although she's not good at socialising, Zack and her have been friends since they were little due to their parents being coworkers. Quitterie's mother is the head doctor at a hospital and she wishes to become a doctor like her in the future, so she's studying medicine. name: Rikuo Uozumi
description: Rikuo is a university graduate who has a passion for photography, but lacks motivation to find a career in life. He works part time at a convenience store to pay for his rent and living utilities. Rikuo has feelings for [Shinako](https://anilist.co/character/68127/Shinako-Morinome) ever since their university days. He works at Nico2 Mart four days a week. name: Rita Vrataski
description: A U.S. special forces soldier. Highly decorated and peerless in battle, she is seen as a hero by the entire world. ~! In reality, she was caught in a time loop just like Keiji. !~

name: Simca
description: When first introduced in the manga, she works at a store called Mamurasaki Sports. Although part time, she quits later on to dedicate time to her team. This fact is not mentioned in the anime. Simca's intent is to gather all the Kings, and their Regalia, for the purpose of conquering the Trophaeum tower, and acquiring the Sky Regalia. name: Sora Takenouchi
description: Sora is a very reliable person and tries to take care of the other kids, like a mother would. Her father works as a professor at the Kyoto University and in Digimon Adventure 02 it is seen that Shuu, one of Kido Jou's older brothers, does research at the university with Sora's father. Because of her father's work at Kyoto, she usually lives only with her mother, who owns a flower shop. Sora is partnered with Piyomon and is the bearer of the Crest of Love. name: Toma
description: A childhood friend of Shin and the heroine. Second year in University student. He likes playing basketball, cycling, surfing the internet, playing video games, cooking, and reading. He is in quite a few school clubs, such as: soccer, broadcasting, archery, and newspaper. His favorite animals are humans. His symbolic route in the game is the "Diamond."

name: Un Anno
description: The reclusive author behind Fuuko's favorite manga *To You, From Me*.

name: Urd
description: Urd is Belldandy's older half sister and is the second Goddess to appear to Keiichi. Urd ranks as Goddess second class, management category limited license, similar to her youngest sister Skuld. She is the Yggdrasil System Administrator and Manager. Though she is much more powerful than her sisters, she could not become a first class goddess because she only wanted power to protect her sisters, not power to protect all beings.
